creator: jsa@wickedmachine.net
text:
This is a minor bump (1.67.26 -> 1.67.27) for lang/fasm.

This was sent via private email to maintainer skv@ on 08/09/2008, no response.

Additional note, fasm is in the lang category while nasm and yasm are both in devel. One or the others seem out of place.

Fix: Patch bumps the version and sets new distinfo.

Patch attached with submission follows:
